text: Love the new recommendations! Finally shows content I actually care about.
The new feature is a huge improvement. Suggestions are spot on.
Recommendations look different. Need to use it more to decide.
App keeps crashing when I open recommendations tab. Very frustrating!
Why is everything so slow now? Took 30 seconds to load my feed.
Great suggestions today, found some items I'd been looking for.
App crashed 3 times in a row. Uninstalling if this continues.
Loading spinner never stops. Recommendations never load at all.
Payment failed twice today. This is a serious issue!
Recommendations are okay, not better or worse than before.
I've had 5 crashes today alone. The app is basically unusable.
Super slow, takes forever to load anything after the update.
My payment didn't go through and I was charged anyway. Refund needed!
Can't complete checkout - it just spins. Lost my cart.
App crashes every time I tap on a recommended product. Terrible update.
When it works, recommendations are actually quite good.
Cancelled my subscription because the app is broken. Fix this!
Crashes are constant now. Going back to competitor app.
Payment error again! Third time this week. Not acceptable.
Why did you break a working app? Rollback please.
Loading times are horrendous. 45 seconds to see recommendations.
Some recommendations are good some are irrelevant. Mixed bag.
Really like the new layout when it actually loads.
STILL crashing! Has this been fixed at all?? Losing patience.
Submitted a support ticket 3 days ago - no response. Terrible support.
Payment failed during flash sale. Missed the deal. Very upset.
App is a joke since the update. Crashing, slow, broken payments.
I just want the old version back. This update ruined everything.
Recommendation accuracy is 10x better. Just wish performance was good.
Still using the app despite bugs. Recommendations are nice when it works.
Downgrading my review to 1 star. Broken app for 6 days now.
Competitor app doesn't crash. Making the switch permanently.
Payment issue cost me money. Need a refund and an explanation.
Crash after crash after crash. This is completely unacceptable.
Why is the update still live? You're losing customers every hour.
App works sometimes but not reliably. Hard to depend on it.
When stable, the new recommendation engine is excellent.
A full week and still broken. I've cancelled my account.
Refund request for failed payment still pending after 4 days.
App crashes on launch now. Can't even open it.
This is a disaster. Your engineering team needs to act NOW.
7 days of crashes = 7 days without the service I'm paying for.
Recommendations concept is brilliant. Execution needs serious work.
Hope they fix it soon. The idea was good.
WARNING: Do not update. App is completely broken since update.
